name: PDFShift
description: PDFShift is a cloud API that converts HTML content or web pages into high-quality PDF, PNG, JPEG, and WebP documents. It supports templates for reusable HTML, advanced rendering options (headers, footers, margins, page sizes), and cloud storage integration. Use this service to programmatically generate documents from HTML or capture web pages as files.

capabilities.name: pdf_convert
capabilities.description: Convert an HTML string or URL to a PDF document with advanced rendering options.

capabilities.name: png_convert
capabilities.description: Convert an HTML string or URL to a PNG screenshot image.

capabilities.name: jpeg_convert
capabilities.description: Convert an HTML string or URL to a JPEG screenshot image.

capabilities.name: webp_convert
capabilities.description: Convert an HTML string or URL to a WebP screenshot image.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List all saved HTML templates in your account.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new reusable HTML template with a unique slug.

capabilities.name: templates_get_html
capabilities.description: Retrieve the raw HTML content of a template by its slug.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Update the name or HTML content of an existing template.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a template by its slug.

capabilities.name: templates_generate
capabilities.description: Generate a document (PDF, PNG, JPEG, WebP, or HTML) from a template with variable substitution.

capabilities.name: logs_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific conversion log entry by request ID.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List all invoices for the account.
